data.title: Neuren Pharmaceuticals Expands Market Presence with New Securities Quotation
data.description:
Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited ( (AU:NEU) ) has shared an announcement.

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited announced the quotation of 200,000 ordinary fully paid securities on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX) as of October 3, 2025. This move is part of the company’s strategic efforts to enhance its market presence and provide additional value to its stakeholders by leveraging financial instruments.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:NEU) stock is a Buy with a A$21.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited stock, see the AU:NEU Stock Forecast page.

More about Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited

Neuren Pharmaceuticals Limited operates in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of therapies for neurodevelopmental disorders and neurodegenerative diseases. The company is known for its innovative approach in addressing unmet medical needs within these specialized markets.

Average Trading Volume: 544,693

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$2.62B

data.title: Tharisa Transitions to Underground Mining for Long-Term Sustainability
data.description:
Tharisa ( (GB:THS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Tharisa has announced a phased transition to underground mining at its Tharisa Mine, aiming to enhance operational efficiency and sustainability. This transition is expected to extend the mine’s life beyond 50 years, maintaining production capacity and offering growth opportunities. The development will be financed through internal cash and external funding, with a focus on reducing environmental impact and increasing long-term value creation.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:THS) stock is a Buy with a £1.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tharisa stock, see the GB:THS Stock Forecast page.

More about Tharisa

Tharisa is an integrated resource group involved in exploration, mining, processing, and the marketing of PGMs and chrome concentrates. The company is critical to the energy transition and decarbonisation of economies, leveraging innovation and technology. Its main asset is the Tharisa Mine in South Africa, and it is also developing the Karo Platinum Project in Zimbabwe. Tharisa is listed on the Johannesburg and London stock exchanges.

Average Trading Volume: 320,564

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £313.4M

Find detailed analytics on THS stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Rosenbauer International Appoints Jörg Schuschnig as New CFO
data.description:
An announcement from Rosenbauer International ( (GB:0FRW) ) is now available.

Rosenbauer International AG has appointed Jörg Schuschnig as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective by October 1, 2026. Schuschnig, a seasoned financial expert with extensive experience in various leadership roles, will succeed CEO Robert Ottel, who has been serving as interim CFO since July. This strategic appointment is expected to strengthen Rosenbauer’s financial leadership and support its growth ambitions.

More about Rosenbauer International

Rosenbauer International AG is a company operating in the firefighting equipment industry, providing a range of products and services related to fire and safety technology. The company is listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange and engages in official trade across several European markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,268

Current Market Cap: €453.9M

data.title: WCM Global Growth Director Increases Shareholding
data.description:
WCM Global Growth Ltd. ( (AU:WQG) ) has provided an announcement.

WCM Global Growth Limited announced a change in the director’s interest notice involving Martin Francis Switzer. The company disclosed that Switzer acquired 427 ordinary shares through the company’s Dividend Reinvestment Plan, increasing his total holdings to 78,104 shares. This change reflects a minor adjustment in the director’s shareholding, which may indicate confidence in the company’s future performance.

data.title: South32 Updates Daily Buy-Back Notification
data.description:
South32 ( (AU:S32) ) has shared an update.

South32 Limited has announced an update regarding its daily buy-back notification, which has been lodged on the Australian Securities Exchange and disclosed on the Johannesburg and London Stock Exchanges. This move is part of the company’s ongoing efforts to manage its capital effectively, potentially impacting its market positioning and shareholder value.

More about South32

South32 Limited is a company engaged in the development of natural resources, producing minerals and metals essential for the global energy transition. With operations across the Americas, Australia, and Southern Africa, South32 is focused on responsibly developing new mines and creating positive impacts for communities and partners.

data.title: Telstra Updates on Significant Buy-Back Program
data.description:
An announcement from Telstra Corporation Limited ( (AU:TLS) ) is now available.

Telstra Group Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing buy-back program, with a total of 34,546,975 securities bought back before the previous day and an additional 1,783,951 securities acquired on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of Telstra’s strategy to optimize its capital structure and enhance shareholder value, reflecting the company’s commitment to efficient capital management and its confidence in future growth prospects.

data.title: Humana AB’s Climate Targets Validated by SBTi
data.description:
Humana AB ( (SE:HUM) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Humana AB has had its climate targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative, aligning with the Paris Agreement to limit global warming. The company aims to reduce its greenhouse gas emissions significantly by 2030 and achieve net-zero emissions by 2050. This validation marks a significant milestone for Humana, reinforcing its commitment to sustainability and setting a precedent for other companies in the industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:HUM) stock is a Hold with a SEK41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Humana AB stock, see the SE:HUM Stock Forecast page.

data.title: CUBE CO., LTD. Reports Strong September Sales Amid Challenging Market Conditions
data.description:
The latest update is out from CUBE CO.,LTD. ( (JP:7112) ).

In September 2025, CUBE CO., LTD. reported a strong sales performance despite challenges in the golf market due to prolonged summer heat. The company achieved a 111.8% year-on-year increase in total sales and a 107.6% increase in same-store sales, driven by strategic merchandising, customer loyalty initiatives, and the expansion of pop-up stores. Looking ahead, CUBE CO., LTD. plans to enhance its brand value and grow its business by increasing customer engagement through new pop-up stores in Tokyo and hosting anniversary events.

More about CUBE CO.,LTD.

CUBE CO., LTD. operates in the retail industry, focusing on both physical and online sales channels. The company engages in domestic retail, domestic e-commerce, and overseas e-commerce, with a particular emphasis on the golf market.

Average Trading Volume: 18,801

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: Yen3.59B
